overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an astronaut character walking through a foggy, snow-covered industrial complex at night, approaching and entering a large facility building, then exploring interior corridors. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with artificial floodlighting cutting through heavy fog.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snow-covered industrial yard toward the large facility building in the distance

tall industrial tower with multiple bright floodlights illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy, snow-covered industrial yard at night, illuminated by tall floodlight towers. An NPC stands near equipment on the right as the character passes by, heading toward a large industrial building visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building entrance with stairs and airlock

events.description: approaching the industrial building entrance and ascending concrete stairs
entering the airlock doorway, transitioning from outdoor fog to indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and entering the facility through the large airlock door

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to the facility entrance
orange metal safety railings flanking both sides of the stairs
large circular metal airlock door with heavy bolts and industrial frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the industrial building, ascending concrete stairs with orange railings toward a large airlock door. The environment transitions from the open snowy yard to the sheltered entrance, with the building facade dominating the view as the character enters through the airlock.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility lobby with reception and seating area

events.description: emerging from airlock into well-lit interior lobby area with other personnel present

long fluorescent light fixtures on exposed industrial ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the facility, the character enters a well-lit lobby with wooden floors, a reception desk, and modern lighting. Two NPCs are present—one standing by a vending machine and another sitting on a bench—while the character walks past potted plants and seating areas toward a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with metallic walls

events.description: entering dark narrow corridor with significantly reduced lighting and metallic walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding into the dark maintenance tunnel toward a distant light

entered.detail: dark metallic paneled walls with recessed lighting strips
faint light source visible at the end of the dark tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dark maintenance corridor with metallic walls and dim recessed lighting. The environment shifts from the open, well-lit lobby to a confined, shadowy tunnel with a distant light source at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, snow-covered industrial yard into the contrasting interiors of a high-tech facility. It begins in a foggy night landscape illuminated by tall floodlight towers, passing an NPC near industrial equipment while heading toward a looming building in the mist. As the character approaches the structure, the scene shifts from the open snowy terrain to a sheltered entrance, ascending concrete stairs with orange railings to pass through a large airlock door. The environment then opens into a bright, modern lobby featuring wooden floors, a reception desk, and NPCs near a vending machine and seating area. Finally, the well-lit space gives way to a confined, shadowy maintenance corridor with metallic walls and dim recessed lighting that stretches toward a distant light source.
